design_philosophy: A functional, mobile-first command center. High contrast ensures readability in any environment. Layered grays replace flat black to establish depth without clutter. Neon status accents (emerald/red) are used sparingly but purposefully to indicate container health.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and category labels. Never use Inter. Must apply tracking-tight for sizes above 24px.

body.usage: Use for all descriptive text, tile names, URLs, and metadata.

status.running: text-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500/10 border-emerald-500/20 (Neon green glow effect)

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, generous spacing for touch targets.

surface_treatment.tiles: rounded-2xl border border-white/5 bg-zinc-900 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:border-white/10
surface_treatment.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/70 border-b border-white/5

tiles.structure: Square or slightly vertical aspect ratio. Icon at top-left, Status dot at top-right, Name and URL at bottom.
tiles.interaction: Entire tile is clickable. Use framer-motion whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }} for tactile feedback.

forms_and_inputs.library: Shadcn UI heavily customized to match the dark theme.
forms_and_inputs.styling: Inputs should have bg-zinc-900/50 border-white/10 focus:border-zinc-50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-50.
forms_and_inputs.checkboxes: Large, accessible touch targets for selecting containers in the setup wizard.

navigation.tabs: Horizontal scrollable pill-shaped tabs for categories (Server, Smart Home, Cloud, etc.). Active state: bg-zinc-50 text-zinc-950. Inactive: text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-50.

icons.style: weight="duotone" for primary illustrations, weight="regular" for UI actions.

motion.page_transitions: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.staggered_lists: Use container variants to stagger the entrance of dashboard tiles.
motion.micro_interactions: Smooth hover states on all interactive elements (duration-200 ease-out).

login_background.description: Abstract dark futuristic texture, use as an atmospheric backdrop for the Setup Wizard and Login screen with a heavy overlay (bg-black/80).

dashboard.description: Main screen. Header with logo and admin/logout dropdown. Category filter tabs below header. Grid of tiles representing services. Mobile responsive.

steps: 3. Container Selection (List of detected containers with checkboxes to add to dashboard)

admin_panel.description: Settings area to manage tiles manually.
features: Add new tile manually (Name, URL, Icon, Category)
Toggle visibility of existing auto-detected containers

testing_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive elements. Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid="login-submit-button", data-testid="tile-plex-link", data-testid="setup-wizard-next-button").
